description_long: This is a tall, slender juice bottle with a curvy silhouette, made of translucent material and filled with an orange-brown liquid. The bottle features a colorful label with Arabic text and a vivid illustration of apples, suggesting an apple juice flavor. The cap is round and appears to be a screw type, decorated with fruit imagery matching the label. The label wraps around the bottle, displaying branding, product information, and a nutritional panel. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A tall, curvy bottle filled with orange-brown juice, featuring a colorful apple-themed label and a screw cap.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle shows a green and white label with detailed product and nutritional information.
description_view_1: This side displays the brand logo and barcode, with a partial view of the apple illustration.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main label with large Arabic text and a vivid apple illustration.
description_view_3: This angle shows the side label with more product information and a partial apple image.
